items.title: Weekly ETF recap: How Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana & XRP funds stacked up?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The performance of Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and XRP ETFs highlights investor sentiment and potential liquidity shifts within the crypto market.

items.title: Wrapped XRP goes live on Solana, broadening DeFi access for Ripple-linked token
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of Wrapped XRP on Solana enhances DeFi opportunities, potentially increasing user engagement and liquidity within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: You Can Now Use XRP on Solana—Here's How
items.whyYouShouldCare: Integrating XRP into Solana's network facilitates cross-chain transactions, which may attract more users and bolster Solana's utility in the DeFi space.
